category_sources: source_facts.description: Utilities for converting macOS DMG images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives dmg2img; current_curation.display-name gives dmg2img.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the author's tools page, the best supplied official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control URL is supplied. source_facts.source-archive is a source tarball, not a repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies macOS DMG image conversion utilities; source_facts.executables lists dmg2img and vfdecrypt.
